overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing a character holding a wooden club walking alongside a wooden farmhouse at night, illuminated by a handheld light source. The character proceeds along a dirt path from the building into an open rural landscape with scattered trees under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmhouse exterior with picket fence

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a wooden farmhouse holding a wooden club, moving past the white picket fence while illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: traditional timber-framed rural house with gabled roof and wooden siding
white wooden picket fence running along the property line
unpaved dirt trail with scattered stones running alongside the house
tall solitary tree silhouetted against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking alongside a traditional wooden farmhouse at night. The camera holder carries a wooden club and moves along a dirt path bordered by a white picket fence. The scene is dimly lit by a handheld light source, with a large tree visible in the distant center against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural field with dirt path

events.description: passing the corner of the farmhouse and entering open countryside

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path away from the house into the open rural landscape, with the wooden club occasionally visible at the edge of the frame

entered.detail: dense green bushes and vegetation lining the left side of the path
grassy open field extending into the darkness on the right side

segments.scene_description: Having passed the farmhouse, the scene opens into wide rural countryside. The dirt path continues forward with bushes lining the left side and open fields to the right. The large distant tree grows slightly larger as the camera approaches, and the night sky becomes fully visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the confined side of a farmhouse into the expansive openness of a rural night landscape. It begins by walking along a dirt path beside a traditional wooden building, where a handheld light illuminates a wooden club and a bordering white picket fence. As the camera passes the farmhouse, the enclosed space opens up into wide countryside with bushes lining the left and open fields stretching to the right. The scene then shifts toward the horizon as the distant, solitary tree grows larger in the frame, while the dark sky overhead reveals a full canopy of stars.
